reasons: This cat exhibits physical characteristics strongly indicative of a Ragdoll or similar large breed. The long, robust body, substantial bone structure, and profuse, semi-longhaired coat contribute to an overall impression of significant size.  Even accounting for the volume added by the fur, the underlying frame appears solid and heavy-set, consistent with a large domestic cat. Based on these visual cues, a weight estimate of around 6.5 kg is reasonable, placing it firmly in the 'large' category for domestic felines.
